strengths: 16+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance distributed systems
Entrepreneurial background as founder of GISCollective, with sustained open-source product ownership since 2016
Recent hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP tooling and agentic workflow frameworks
concerns: No graduate degree in an AI-related field; dual bachelor's (CS + Fine Arts/Design) without any ML or AI academic specialization
AI experience is shallow and very recent — primarily developer tooling and infrastructure glue rather than deep AI/ML product development, research, or strategy
No evidence of director-level scope: enterprise customer advisory, cross-organizational technical leadership, or external thought leadership in AI are absent from the record
response.justification: The candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with genuine breadth, entrepreneurial spirit, and a solid 16-year track record — but this role requires recognized AI expertise, a preferred graduate degree in an AI-related field, and director-level IC experience advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. The AI work on the resume is limited to a few months of agentic tooling at re:cinq, with no demonstrated AI products, published research, or strategic advisory history. The seniority and specialization gap is too wide for a Principal Engineer — AI Strategy position.
